lossItems.downstreamRisk: External consumers may not receive the full internal lineage needed for high-consequence review.
lossItems.mitigation: Require governed passport or document outputs when full lineage must accompany the exchange.

lossItems.downstreamRisk: An NGSI-LD façade alone cannot prove governance basis or review posture.
lossItems.mitigation: Expose those details through governed OFARM outputs or partner-specific evidence channels rather than the generic façade.

lossItems.downstreamRisk: The façade compresses history-first internals into a simpler outward resource model.
lossItems.mitigation: Treat the export as projection-only and keep trace-back links to the canonical substrate.

notes: Loss posture for NGSI-LD export where façade usability is preserved without replacing canonical OFARM truth.
